programme.title: Solitary Man
programme.desc: A series of bad decisions upends car dealer Ben Kalmen's business, his wandering eye costs him his marriage to Nancy, and he has to relocate from a grand home to a tiny flat. Even Ben's current girlfriend Jordan knows he's far from perfect. But a hastily planned trip to Boston -- he's showing Jordan's teen daughter, Allyson, one of the city's many colleges -- just might rouse Ben from his losing s

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When it comes to dating, Christina Walters (Cameron Diaz) has a golden rule: avoid searching for Mr. Right and focus on Mr. Right Now. That is until one night at a club when she unexpectedly meets Peter (Thomas Jane), only to see him suddenly disappear the next day. She and her best friend Courtney (Christina Applegate) decide to break the rules and go on a road trip to find him, encountering wild

programme.title: Tracks
programme.desc: Accompanied only by her faithful dog and four camels, an Australian (Mia Wasikowska) satisfies her craving for solitude by embarking on a solo trip across the desert from Alice Springs to the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: Trading Mom
programme.desc: A magic spell allows two unhappy children (Anna Chlumsky, Aaron Michael Metchik) to forget their mother (Sissy Spacek) and shop for a new one.

programme.title: The Best Christmas Pageant Ever
programme.desc: The Herdmans are six siblings who have a reputation for being the worst kids in the world. However, when they take over the local church pageant during the holidays, they just might teach a shocked community the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: The Moon and Back
programme.desc: High school senior Lydia Gilbert feels lost after her father's death, until she discovers a space opera script written by him. Equipped with a VHS camera and pocket change, she decides to honor her dad and make the script a reality.

programme.title: Measure of a Man
programme.desc: A teen develops a bond with a Wall Street executive while learning to stand up to bullies during one life-changing summer.

programme.title: A Stork's Journey
programme.desc: An orphaned sparrow is adopted and raised by storks. When the family leaves on its annual migration, the little sparrow attempts to participate in the long, arduous journey.

programme.title: A Stork's Journey 2
programme.desc: Richard gives everything he's got to become flock leader only to learn his brother Max has been given the job. After deciding to take flight and start a new life, Richard begins a journey full of thrills and surprises.

programme.title: House of D
programme.desc: In the present, artist Tom Warshaw recalls his traumatic coming of age. As a 13-year-old growing up in New York City in 1973, Tom hangs out with Pappass, a mentally disabled man. With Tom's mother battling depression after the death of her husband, the young boy is left to his own devices. When Tom develops a crush on schoolmate Melissa, Pappass feels abandoned and begins behaving erratically.

programme.title: Doogal
programme.desc: Florence and her animal friends live in the Enchanted Village, which is under the care of Zebedee, a kindly wizard. However, a dark cloud is approaching this sunny world. After being encased in ice for eons, Zeebad, the evil double of Zebedee, reappears and threatens to start another ice age. The only way to stop him is for Florence and friends to find three magic diamonds before he does.

programme.desc: The Limey follows Wilson (Terence Stamp), a tough English ex-con who travels to Los Angeles to avenge his daughter's death. After surviving a near-death beating, getting thrown from a building and being chased down a dangerous mountain

programme.title: The Dangerous Lives of Altar Boys
programme.desc: Francis Doyle (Emile Hirsch) and Tim Sullivan (Kieran Culkin), and their closest friends, are fighting the stultifying repression of their parish school. Foremost among the forces of evil is the stern and disapproving nun, Sister Assumpta (Jodie Foster), who rules their lives. She seizes their artwork one day, setting the boys on an obsessed trail of revenge that ultimately changes their lives.

programme.title: The Party
programme.desc: Janet hosts an intimate gathering of friends in her London home to celebrate her political ascension. After her acerbic best friend and others arrive, some with dramatic news to share, an announcement by Janet's husband provokes a series of revelations. As the sophisticated soiree starts to unravel, a night that began with champagne soon ends up with arguments, shouting and a pointed gun.

programme.title: Starting Out in the Evening
programme.desc: A complex relationship develops between Leonard (Frank Langella), an academic novelist of advancing years, and Heather (Lauren Ambrose), a determined, fresh-faced graduate student doing her master's thesis on Leonard's career. Leonard keeps everyone at an emotional distance, including his devoted daughter, Ariel (Lili Taylor), and her unsettled boyfriend, Casey (Adrian Lester). Heather's attention

programme.title: Purple Violets
programme.desc: After the commercial failure of her critically acclaimed first novel, Patti Petalson (Selma Blair) takes a job in real estate. Married to unfaithful chef Chazz (Donal Logue), Patti is startled by a chance encounter with her former boyfriend, Brian Callahan (Patrick Wilson), now a best-selling author. As the two renew their interest in each other, Patti's teacher friend, Kate (Debra Messing), also

programme.title: Miss Juneteenth
programme.desc: A former beauty queen and single mom prepares her rebellious teenage daughter for the "Miss Juneteenth" pageant.

programme.title: Things Never Said
programme.desc: Kalindra tries desperately to find an outlet for her struggling voice and escape from her abusive husband.

programme.title: The Three Sisters
programme.desc: Three Mexican-American sisters embark on a traditional pilgrimage through Mexico, honoring their grandmother's legacy while working to mend their strained relationships.

programme.title: American Heart
programme.desc: This unflinching drama tells the story of recently released ex-convict Jack Kelson (Jeff Bridges) as he struggles to begin a new life outside of prison and build a relationship with his estranged teenage son Nick (Edward Furlong). programme.title: All Is Lost

programme.title: Miss Juneteenth

programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their family's home. With nowhere else to turn, they move in with their estranged older sister and her husband. After enrolling in a new school, they find support from an eccentric art teacher and form an unexpected bond with a kindhearted student.

programme.title: Stuck Between Stations
programme.desc: A soldier and a graduate student walk and talk through nighttime Minneapolis.

programme.title: Another 9 1/2 Weeks
programme.desc: Despondent at losing his lover, a man (Mickey Rourke) wanders the streets of Paris and has an affair with her kinky friend (Angie Everhart).

programme.title: Johnny Skidmarks
programme.desc: A crime photographer (Peter Gallagher) involved in blackmail becomes nervous when associates start to die.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
programme.desc: After their dog Zeus ruins a party, George takes him to an obedience school run by a no-nonsense instructor. When Zeus manages to fail every test, he seeks help from a trainer with special techniques.

programme.title: The Quest for Tom Sawyer's Gold
programme.desc: A risk-averse English teacher is forced to face her fears when several of her students venture alone into the southern wilderness in search of Tom Sawyer's long-lost gold.

programme.title: A Shine of Rainbows
programme.desc: A lonely orphan's life is transformed by a woman who teaches him to conquer grief and discover the magic in nature and himself.

programme.title: Air Bound
programme.desc: A city mouse and his friends stow away on a ship headed for Dream Island, hoping to save their families from a sinister white weasel.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: Cady Heron enrolls at North Shore High School near Chicago after living in Africa. She interacts with Regina George, a prominent student who previously dated Aaron Samuels. programme.title: Mean Girls 2
programme.desc: After a clique of girls makes life difficult, a new student (Meaghan Martin) forms a rival group to take control of the school's corridors.

programme.title: Bart Got a Room
programme.desc: Everyone is searching for love in director Brian Hecker's semi-autobiographical story. Danny Stein, a high school senior at the bottom of the social food chain, needs a prom date. As a cause of anxiety for Danny, Bart Beeber, the nerdiest guy in school, has already found a date -- and booked a hotel room. At the same time, Danny's divorced parents are both looking for relationships again.

programme.title: Man, Pride and Vengeance

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne turns down the job of top hand for rancher Ben Gentry but finds two more offers awaiting him for the same job.

programme.desc: When Cold War veteran Stan Hurley takes CIA black ops recruit Mitch Rapp under his wing, they receive an assignment to investigate a wave of random attacks on both military and civilian targets. After discovering a pattern of violence, Hurley and Rapp join forces with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative who wants to start a global war.

programme.desc: From the classic novel by Graham Greene comes a murder mystery centered on a love triangle set against the French Indochina War in Vietnam, circa 1952. This is a world where nothing is what it seems -- suffused with opium, intrigue, and betrayal.

programme.title: The Peacemaker

programme.title: Bang Bang

programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her son's disappearance.

programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Due Justice
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Hard Rain
programme.desc: The small town of Huntingburg is forced to evacuate when torrential rains bring rising floodwaters. The local sheriff and town residents, having been through this before, are all too familiar with the looting and petty thefts that take place in an abandoned town. What they are not aware of, however, is the planned heist of an armored car sent to transport the $3 million from local banks.

programme.desc: A soldier uses his military training to rescue the kidnapped daughter of his dead friend.

programme.title: Confess, Fletch
programme.desc: While investigating a case of stolen paintings, the roguishly charming and endlessly troublesome Fletch becomes the prime suspect in a murder. To prove his innocence, he must sift through a long list of suspects, including his own girlfriend.

When he and his family are displaced from their native India and settle in a quaint French village, they decide to open an Indian eatery. programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: Welcome to Greenleaf, a picture-postcard Indiana town where the high school is the proud focus of attention and alternative lifestyle means you bowl on alternate Tuesdays. On the night of the Oscars telecast, the town's and the world's center of attention is Greenleaf teacher Howard Brackett. A former student who's now a superstar actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay.

programme.title: Zanjeer

programme.desc: Dharam and his son exist by conning people. Soon Paramveer arrives in town and claims he is Dharam's elder son.

programme.title: Bhediya
programme.desc: Bhaskar and his cousin travel for work, but a string of events leads to Bhaskar being attacked by a wolf, giving him werewolf powers.

programme.title: Sangdil Sanam

programme.title: Lucky-No Time For Love
programme.desc: Lucky is molested by a Russian boy on her way to school but she escapes and hides in Aditya's car. When a terrorist attack breaks out, the two manage to escape and hide in an isolated graveyard.

programme.title: Total Siyapaa

programme.title: Chandni
programme.desc: Chandni's fiance, Rohit, is paralysed in an accident and she is forced to relocate to Mumbai where her boss, Lalit, falls for her. However, she faces a dilemma when Rohit returns and woos her too.

programme.title: Seetharamam
programme.desc: Upon returning to Pakistan, Afreen sets off to fulfil her grandfather's wish of delivering a letter from Ram to Sita. Along the way, she finds Ram and learns about their love story.
